Maternal, Child and Adolescent Health
Community Nursing IMPACT Program
Contact Us:
1-877-680-BABY (2229)
www.babyfirstsolano.org
Central Referral Form
Who We Are:
Community Nursing IMPACT is composed of public health nurses, who are Registered Nurses with advanced training and education to provide health care to the community in a variety of settings.
What We Do:
Under a model of prevention, Public Health Nurses assess and educate individuals and families to promote healthy lifestyles and reduce risks that cause disease, disability and premature death by identifying and linking families to community resources.
Public Health Nurses provide home visits to mothers and children of all ages in Solano County.
Public Health Nurses provide care during pregnancy and the postpartum period, providing education and assisting with breastfeeding, infant attachment, and child development.
Community Nursing IMPACT logo
